title: calathea vittata
intro: Calathea vittata is a species of plant within the Marantaceae family, known as the prayer plant due to its unique ability to fold its leaves upwards at night, resembling hands clasped in prayer. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calathea vittata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which are then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
